gc-layout://world/origin.title: World origin
gc-layout://world/origin.description: Place the subject at the upper-left origin of the playable world.

gc-layout://world/center.title: World center
gc-layout://world/center.description: Place the subject at the center of the playable world.

gc-layout://world/left-middle.title: World left middle
gc-layout://world/left-middle.description: Place the subject at the middle of the world left edge.

gc-layout://world/right-middle.title: World right middle
gc-layout://world/right-middle.description: Place the subject at the middle of the world right edge.

gc-layout://world/top-center.title: World top center
gc-layout://world/top-center.description: Place the subject at the center of the world top edge.

gc-layout://world/bottom-center.title: World bottom center
gc-layout://world/bottom-center.description: Place the subject at the center of the world bottom edge.

gc-layout://screen/top-left.title: Screen top left
gc-layout://screen/top-left.description: Place a screen-facing subject at the upper-left screen anchor.

gc-layout://screen/top-right.title: Screen top right
gc-layout://screen/top-right.description: Place a screen-facing subject at the upper-right screen anchor.

gc-layout://screen/bottom-left.title: Screen bottom left
gc-layout://screen/bottom-left.description: Place a screen-facing subject at the lower-left screen anchor.

gc-layout://screen/bottom-right.title: Screen bottom right
gc-layout://screen/bottom-right.description: Place a screen-facing subject at the lower-right screen anchor.
